price_zone_notes: The classification of area is not an official classification standard.
Predicted monthly rents are based on a hedonic price regression model.
Rents are not strictly comparable over time.
selected_price_zones: Oslo - Sentrum, Frogner, Ullern and St. Hanshaugen
Oslo - Grunerlokka, Gamle Oslo, Sagene, Nordre Aker and Vestre Aker
Oslo - Sondre Nordstrand, Grorud, Stovner and Alna
notes: This file is a seed schema placeholder for the next structured extraction step.
Area labels are kept exactly in the normalized project form used elsewhere in the repository.
Do not treat these price zones as equivalent to bydeler.
